title: Cyperus neourbanii
intro: Cyperus neourbanii, also known as Urban's papyrus sedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in the management of conditions such as diabetes and cardiovascular diseases. The bioactive constituents of Cyperus neourbanii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions.
taxonomy: I can find the classification of Cyperus neourbanii. Cyperus neourbanii is classified within the family Cyperaceae.
